query: SELECT id, userId, displayName, name, email, phone, livesRemaining, currentStreak, createdAt, updatedAt FROM participants WHERE LOWER(displayName) LIKE '%nay%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%nay%' OR LOWER(email) LIKE '%nay%' ORDER BY updatedAt DESC;
